cohort_binding_note: Sub-gates (b)-(e) are absence-style predicates that are interpretable as manifest-failure evidence ONLY in conjunction with sub-gate (a). A reader must not read 'revision list empty' or 'ACR repo absent' as evidence of this specific failure mode without also seeing the Failed deployment with MANIFEST_UNKNOWN. The predicate_inputs block records the deployment attribution and the absences in the same gate JSON so they cannot be interpreted separately.
sub_gate_a_predicate: Deployment failed (01-deployment-result.provisioningState == 'Failed') AND at least one per-operation record in 01-deployment-operations-failed.json contains 'MANIFEST_UNKNOWN' in statusMessage.error.message. Single-path per Oracle Q2 directive: 01-deployment-operations-failed.json is the MANIFEST_UNKNOWN canonical source; 01-deployment-result.json is optional corroboration only.
sub_gate_c_predicate: Container App latestRevisionName is null (02-containerapp-show-baseline.latestRevisionName). Single-path.
sub_gate_d_predicate: Revision list is the empty array (03-revisions-list-baseline.json == []). Single-path.
sub_gate_e_predicate: ACR repository list does not contain 'labacr' (04-acr-repository-list-baseline.json membership check). Record-scoped per Lab 15 lesson 34: parsed JSON array membership, not greppy substring matching. Single-path.

sub_gate_a_deployment_failed_with_manife.observed_first_smoking_gun_excerpt: Failed to provision revision for container app 'ca-labacr-rnnljl'. Error details: The following field(s) are either invalid or missing. Field 'template.containers.app.image' is invalid with details: 'Invalid value: "acrlabacrrnnljl.azurecr.io/labacr:does-not-exist": GET https:: MANIFEST_UNKNOWN: man
